title: Preparation of Chemicals
author: NUS iGEM

steps_raw.instruction: Weigh x grams of desired chemical
Dissolve in sterile deionized water for IPTG and arabinose or DMSO for ATC
Syringe filter chemical solution using a 0.22-μm filter
